docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $409.72 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT PATTONS CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
